top3.sql:
SELECT Segment
FROM customers
WHERE CustomerID IN (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date LIKE '2013-09%'
    ORDER BY Consumption ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT c.Segment
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2013-09'
GROUP BY c.Segment
ORDER BY SUM(ym.Consumption) ASC
LIMIT 1;

    ORDER BY Consumption ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2013-09'

ORDER BY SUM(ym.Consumption) ASC
LIMIT 1;

ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT Segment
FROM customers
WHERE CustomerID IN (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM yearmonth
    WHERE Date LIKE '2013-09%'
    ORDER BY Consumption ASC
    LIMIT 1
